text.tspan: Daily protein supply per capita vs. GDP per capita, 1961 to 2013
Daily protein supply, measured as the average supply in grams per person per day versus gross domestic product
(GDP) per capita, adjusted for differences in the cost of living between countries, and for inflation.
Source: Daily protein supply - FAO (2017), Feenstra et al. (2015), Penn World Table v10.0
